title: Python node.py: RELAY_SEEN_MAX_SIZE clear() loses all history
description: In python/src/lichen/node.py at lines 390 and 480, when _relay_seen exceeds RELAY_SEEN_MAX_SIZE (128), the entire set is cleared. This creates a brief window where recently-relayed packets could be relayed again if they are received right after the clear(). Consider using an LRU eviction strategy that removes the oldest entries instead of clearing everything.
